_source: Spec-derived from code.claude.com/docs/en/tools — MultiEdit tool reference. Slice 2 will refine to capture-driven fixture.
_slice_1_decision: SINGLE-FILE per Claude Code docs. The 'edits' array is multiple replacements WITHIN the one file_path. Gate parser MUST NOT iterate over edits to look for multiple file paths — there is only one. This closes MAJOR M2 in the Codex addendum (2026-06-08): the v1 proposal's 'check ALL of them' fan-out requirement is DROPPED.
